title: verbascum × silifkense
intro: Verbascum × silifkense, also known as the Hybrid Mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the Scrophulariaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its mucilaginous leaves, which contain saponins and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. The health benefits of Verbascum × silifkense include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Verbascum × silifkense can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
